users.name: Jua Sheria (Katiba Kwa Lugha Ya Mama)

metadata.slogan: Stop fighting with pixel while you can automate

plans.name: Pro
plans.features: ["5,000 PDF Conversions","500 AI Documents","AI Content Generation","Priority Support","Analytics"]

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.features: ["Unlimited PDF Conversions","5,000 AI Documents","AI Content Generation","Dedicated Support","Custom Integrations","SLA"]

plans.name: BrandWithJojo - Branded Document Creation and Management Workflows
Teaser
plans.features: ["25 PDF Conversions","5 AI Documents","AI Content Generation","Community Support"]

plans.name: Starter
plans.features: ["500 PDF Conversions","50 AI Documents","AI Content Generation","Basic Support","API Access"]

features.name: Branded Workflows
features.description: Access to custom branded document workflows

features.name: Unlimited PDF Conversions
features.description: Remove daily/monthly limits on PDF conversions.

services.name: HMRC VAT Invoice Generator
services.description: Convert Word invoices into HMRC-compliant PDF format.

services.name: GDPR SAR Compiler
services.description: Combine multiple client record files into a single Subject Access Request bundle.

services.name: Bank Statement Extractor
services.description: Extract specific pages from monthly bank statement PDFs for accounting.

services.name: Email Attachment Optimizer
services.description: Compress large scan PDFs to meet email server size limits.

services.name: Right to Rent Proof Extractor
services.description: Convert passport PDF pages to images for ID verification checks.

services.name: Receipt Digitizer
services.description: Convert photos of receipts into professional PDF expense reports.

services.name: Contract Encryptor
services.description: Password protect sensitive employee contracts and wage slips.

services.name: Legacy Doc Unlocker
services.description: Remove lost passwords from old archived business documents.

services.name: HTML to PDF Converter
services.description: Convert raw HTML or URLs to PDF.

services.name: Floovioo Transactional
services.description: The core engine for the Transactional Branding product. Handles triggers from ERPs and dispatches to specific n8n workflows.

services.name: Transactional Branding
services.description: Automatic branding and delivery of transactional documents (invoices, estimates, etc.) from connected ERPs.

services.name: Data Sync Engine
services.description: Internal-first service ensuring ERP data is synchronized to Floovioo/n8n datastores

services.name: Debt Collection AI
services.description: AI-powered dunning and payment recovery automation with risk scoring

services.name: AI Content Engine
services.description: Shared service for generating AI content (emails, summaries, marketing copy) using GPT-4

services.name: Publisher Engine
services.description: High-end branded document generation (invoices, receipts, reports)

services.name: Omnichannel Delivery
services.description: Unified delivery API for Email, SMS, WhatsApp, and Push notifications

services.name: Sales Accelerator
services.description: Post-sale customer nurturing and LTV maximization product

services.name: AI Document Generator
services.description: Generate GDPR notices, Employment Contracts, and Health & Safety policies instantly.

integrationDefinitions.name: Zoho CRM
integrationDefinitions.description: Sync clients and invoices with Zoho CRM & Books.

integrationDefinitions.name: QuickBooks Online
integrationDefinitions.description: Automated accounting sync for invoices and expenses.

config.scope: offline_access openid profile email accounting.transactions accounting.contacts accounting.settings

apps.name: Public Demo App
apps.description: App used for public landing page demos

apps.name: Public Demo App
apps.description: App used for public landing page demos

workflows.name: Auto-Brand New Invoices (QuickBooks)
workflows.description: Automatically applies branding when an invoice is created in QuickBooks
